ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_a" TEXT /* Name of Team A participating in the match */,
  "team_b" TEXT /* Name of Team B participating in the match */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the match is being held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "total_overs" INTEGER /* Total number of overs for the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Current status of the match */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match */,
  "umpire_1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire_2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the match referee */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Name of the player of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each innings */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which innings is played */,
  "batting_team" TEXT /* Name of the team batting in the innings */,
  "over" INTEGER /* Current over number of the innings */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the innings */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets lost in the innings */,
  "inning_number" INTEGER /* Inning number (1 or 2) */,
  "runs_required" INTEGER /* Runs required to win the match for the team batting in the second inning */,
  "wickets_in_hand" INTEGER /* Wickets in hand for the team batting in the second inning */,
  "target_runs" INTEGER /* Target runs set by the team batting first */,
  "inning_status" TEXT /* Status of the inning */,
  "batting_order" TEXT /* Order in which the batsmen batted in the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("innings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the innings in which this delivery occurred */,
  "ball" INTEGER /* The ball number in the current over */,
  "over" INTEGER /* The over number in which this delivery was bowled */,
  "cum_runs" INTEGER /* Cumulative runs scored till this delivery */,
  "run_total" INTEGER /* Total runs scored at the end of the over */,
  "cum_wickets" INTEGER /* Cumulative wickets lost till this delivery */,
  "wicket_total" INTEGER /* Total wickets lost at the end of the over */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored off this delivery */,
  "wicket" INTEGER /* Indicates if a wicket was taken (0 or 1) */,
  "match_situation" TEXT /* Current situation of the match in terms of runs and wickets */,
  "bowler" TEXT /* Name of the bowler who bowled this delivery */,
  "batsman" TEXT /* Name of the batsman who faced the delivery */,
  "non_striker" TEXT /* Name of the non-striker */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Number of extras (wides, no-balls, etc.) in the delivery */,
  "extra_type" TEXT /* Type of extra (e.g., 'wides', 'no-balls', 'byes') */,
  "field_placement" TEXT /* Placement of fielders */,
  "ball_type" TEXT /* Type of ball (e.g., 'fast', 'off spin', 'leg spin') */,
  "ball_speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the ball in km/h */,
  "ball_length" TEXT /* Length of the ball (e.g., 'full', 'short', 'good') */,
  "ball_line" TEXT /* Line of the ball (e.g., 'straight', 'outside off', 'leg stump') */,
  "ball_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the ball (e.g., 'four', 'six', 'out') */,
  "over_type" TEXT /* Type of over (e.g., 'powerplay', 'normal') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_innings_id FOREIGN KEY ("innings_id") REFERENCES innings ("innings_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the player belongs */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., 'batsman', 'bowler', 'all-rounder') */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style (e.g., 'right-handed', 'left-handed') */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style (e.g., 'right-arm fast', 'left-arm orthodox') */,
  "career_start" TEXT /* Date when the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end" TEXT /* Date when the player ended their professional career */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a match */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling figures in a match */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)
